center.name: 安东·赖歇诺
center.summary: 安东·赖歇诺是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联27种鸟类，包括索马里鸵鸟、Striped flufftail、烏干達點啄木等27种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The African grey flycatcher, grayish flycatcher, or large flycatcher (Bradornis microrhynchus) is a passerine bird in the Old World flycatcher family Muscicapidae that occurs in parts of East Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Anambra waxbill (Estrilda poliopareia) is a species of estrildid finch found in wetter land of southern Nigeria and Benin

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Bismarck fantail (Rhipidura dahli) is a fantail native to the islands New Britain and New Ireland

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The gorgeous sunbird (Cinnyris melanogastrus) is a small passerine bird in the sunbird family Nectariniidae that is found in southern Kenya and Tanzania

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The green longtail (Urolais epichlorus) is a bird species of the family Cisticolidae, in the monotypic genus Urolais. It is native to the Western High Plateau and the Cameroonian Highlands forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The grey-headed sunbird (Deleornis axillaris) is a small passerine bird which breeds in mixed forest in the Democratic Republic of the Congo and western Uganda

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Kandt's waxbill (Estrilda kandti) is a species of estrildid finch found in central Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Kenya sparrow (Passer rufocinctus), also known as the Kenya rufous sparrow, is a sparrow found in Kenya and Tanzania

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The miombo wren-warbler (Calamonastes undosus), also known as the miombo barred warbler or pale wren-warbler, is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae found in southern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The montane widowbird (Euplectes psammacromius), also known as the mountain marsh widowbird is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae, which is native to the eastern Afrotropics

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Pemba sunbird (Cinnyris pembae) is a species of bird in the sunbird family

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The plateau lark (Corypha nigrescens) is a species of lark in the family Alaudidae found in east Zambia, north Malawi and south Tanzania

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Preuss's weaver (Ploceus preussi) is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae, which is native to the African tropics

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The pygmy eagle or New Guinea hawk-eagle (Hieraaetus weiskei) is a bird of prey found in New Guinea

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The rufous-tailed weaver (Histurgops ruficauda) is a species of songbird found in Tanzania

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Stierling's wren-warbler (Calamonastes stierlingi), is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae found in southern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: antonii, named for German ornithologist Anton Reichenow, is found in eastern Zimbabwe and Mozambique, Malawi, southern Tanzania, Kenya and the south of South Sudan.Taylor, B

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Taita falcon (Falco fasciinucha) is a small falcon found in central and eastern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Usambara thrush (Turdus roehli), also known as Roehl's thrush or Usambara olive thrush, is a species of thrush found in eastern Africa. Formerly, it was considered as a subspecies of the olive thrush, with which it is known to hybridize with, but is now recognised as a separate species

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The speckle-breasted woodpecker (Dendropicos poecilolaemus) is a species of bird in the family Picidae, which is native to sub-Saharan Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-tailed lark (Mirafra albicauda) is a species of lark in the family Alaudidae found in Africa

birds.evidence: No other populations are included in the CITES Appendices.}} | genus = Struthio | species = molybdophanes | authority = Reichenow, 1883 | range_map = Struthio camelus distribution.svg | range_map_caption = Yellow area shows range of Struthio molybdophanes | synonyms = *Struthio camelus molybdophanes Reichenow, 1883 | synonyms_ref = }} The Somali ostrich (Struthio molybdophanes), also known as the blue-necked ostrich, is a large flightless bird native to the Horn of Africa.{{cite book |last1=Redman |first1=N

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Granatina ianthinogaster |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22719504A263844193 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T22719504A263844193.en |access-date=22 June 2025}} | taxon = Granatina ianthinogaster | authority = (Reichenow, 1879) }} The purple grenadier (Granatina ianthinogaster) is a common species of estrildid finch found in eastern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red-winged lark (Corypha hypermetra) is a species of lark in the family Alaudidae found in eastern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-cheeked waxbill or red-rumped waxbill (Brunhilda charmosyna) is a common species of estrildid finch found in east Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Abyssinian crimsonwing (Cryptospiza salvadorii), also known as the Ethiopian crimsonwing, Salvadori's crimsonwing or crimson-backed forest finch, is a common species of estrildid finch found in eastern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The yellow-collared lovebird (Agapornis personatus), also called masked lovebird, black-masked lovebird or eye ring lovebird, is a monotypic species of bird of the lovebird genus in the parrot family Psittaculidae
